Instance.BindInstances: add_ln105_fu_164_p2 fmul_32ns_32ns_32_4_max_dsp_1_U2 fmul_32ns_32ns_32_4_max_dsp_1_U2 fadd_32ns_32ns_32_5_full_dsp_1_U1 fmul_32ns_32ns_32_4_max_dsp_1_U2 fadd_32ns_32ns_32_5_full_dsp_1_U1 add_ln346_fu_210_p2 sub_ln1512_fu_224_p2
mul_32ns_32ns_64_2_1_U34 add_ln38_fu_211_p2 add_ln38_1_fu_220_p2 mul_mul_19s_19s_19_4_1_U35 add_ln40_fu_252_p2 add_ln39_fu_293_p2 visited_U queue_x_U queue_y_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
input_rgb_1, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of input_rgb,
input_rgb_2, 0x14, 32, W, Data signal of input_rgb,
result_rank, 0x1c, 32, R, Data signal of result_rank,
result_rank_ctrl, 0x20, 32, R, Control signal of result_rank, 0=result_rank_ap_vld
result_suit, 0x2c, 32, R, Data signal of result_suit,
result_suit_ctrl, 0x30, 32, R, Control signal of result_suit, 0=result_suit_ap_vld
width, 0x3c, 32, W, Data signal of width,
height, 0x44, 32, W, Data signal of height,

table.keys: Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Usage, HW Info
table.column: s_axi_control, register, offset, name=input_rgb_1 offset=0x10 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=input_rgb_2 offset=0x14 range=32

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

table.keys: HW Interface, Loop, Direction, Length, Width, Location
HW Interface, Variable, Loop, Problem, Resolution, Location
table.column: input_rgb, VITIS_LOOP_105_1, Could not widen since type i8 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0, 214-353, card_recognizer_hls.cpp:105:23
